sentences.base_language: My name is Audrey, I'm from Philadelphia or something
sentences.target_language: 私の名前はオードリーです。フィラデルフィア出身です、たぶん。
sentences.romanized: Watashi no namae wa Ōdorī desu. Firaderufia shusshin desu, tabun.
sentences.literal: My name Audrey is. Philadelphia from-born am, probably.

sentences.base_language: I have a lot of hobbies!
sentences.target_language: 趣味がたくさんあります！

sentences.base_language: I like to ride bikes with my boyfriend Waller
sentences.target_language: 彼氏のウォーラーと自転車に乗るのが好きです。
sentences.romanized: Kareshi no Wōrā to jitensha ni noru no ga suki desu.
sentences.literal: Boyfriend Waller with bicycle ride like.

sentences.base_language: I like to make crafts too
sentences.target_language: 手芸をするのも好きです。
sentences.romanized: Shugei wo suru no mo suki desu.

sentences.base_language: What kind of crafts you might ask
sentences.target_language: どんな手芸かって聞くかもしれませんね。
sentences.romanized: Donna shugei katte kiku kamo shiremasen ne.
sentences.literal: What kind crafts-as-for ask might, right.
sentences.grammarNote: 〜かもしれない (kamo shirenai) = 'might / may / perhaps'. It expresses possibility without certainty. The ね at the end invites the listener into the narrative. 〜かって is a casual quotation particle: 'as for the question of what kind…'

sentences.base_language: Well the person writing this didn't ask so I'm guessing puppets
sentences.target_language: まあ、これを書いた人は聞かなかったので、たぶん人形劇かな。
sentences.romanized: Mā, kore wo kaita hito wa kikanakatta node, tabun ningyōgeki ka na.
sentences.literal: Well, this-wrote person didn't-ask so, probably puppets maybe.

sentences.base_language: I also have a lot of plants
sentences.target_language: 植物もたくさん持っています。

sentences.base_language: Like more plants than you'd ever imagine
sentences.target_language: 想像できないくらいたくさんの植物です。
sentences.romanized: Sōzō dekinai kurai takusan no shokubutsu desu.

sentences.base_language: I work as a fortune teller
sentences.target_language: 占い師として働いています。

sentences.base_language: I can read tarot cards and predict the future
sentences.target_language: タロットカードを読んで未来を予言できます。
sentences.romanized: Tarotto kādo wo yonde mirai wo yogen dekimasu.
sentences.literal: Tarot cards read future predict can.

sentences.base_language: I play dungeons and dragons with my best friends
sentences.target_language: 親友たちとダンジョンズ・アンド・ドラゴンズをやっています。
sentences.romanized: Shin'yū-tachi to Danjonzu Ando Doragonzu wo yatte imasu.
sentences.literal: Best-friends with Dungeons and Dragons playing.

sentences.base_language: Other than that I am pretty chill
sentences.target_language: それ以外は、わりとのんびりしています。
sentences.romanized: Sore igai wa, warito nonbiri shite imasu.

sentences.target_language: 時々ベーグルを買います。

sentences.base_language: One day Jeff will ask more follow up questions to write more on this story
sentences.target_language: いつかジェフがもっと質問してくれて、この話が続くといいですね。
sentences.romanized: Itsuka Jefu ga motto shitsumon shite kurete, kono hanashi ga tsuzuku to ii desu ne.
sentences.literal: Someday Jeff more questions ask-give, this story continues would-be-good right.

sentences.base_language: But for now, that is about it
sentences.target_language: でも今のところ、こんな感じです。
sentences.romanized: Demo ima no tokoro, konna kanji desu.
